codeReview.summary: Clean, well-reasoned implementation across 3 files. Worker correctly chose 1.5x scale (30x36) over the initially suggested 2x (40x48) to fit the 36px title bar, following the feature description's own fallback guidance. Four changes: (1) SVG icon scale increased from SVG_FP_ONE to SVG_FP_ONE*3/2 with rasterization at 30x36. (2) Single-channel SVG coverage correctly converted to 3-channel RGB for draw_coverage() subpixel format — the conversion loop is straightforward and correct, and the temporary single-channel Vec is properly dropped while the 3-channel Vec is intentionally leaked for static storage. (3) img-icon.svg y-coordinates shifted by -2 so path starts at y=0, consistent with doc-icon.svg. (4) Document name changed from hardcoded 'Untitled' to context-dependent 'Text'/'Image' using the existing IMAGE_MODE flag. The from_raw_parts slice size was correctly updated to icon_w*icon_h*3. Tests are appropriate: 3 new tests verify both icons rasterize with significant coverage at chrome size and that they are distinguishable from each other. Existing frame border test updated for the shifted y-origin. Visual verification via QEMU screenshots confirmed clean rendering in both text editor and image viewer modes.

issues.description: The doc icon SVG (20x24 units) fills the full 36px height at 1.5x scale, while the img icon SVG (20x20 units) only fills 30 of 36 pixels, leaving 6 empty pixels at the bottom. Both use the same 30x36 buffer and icon_y=0 positioning. This means the icons have slightly different visual weight/height. Not a bug — the icons are intentionally different shapes — but worth noting if visual polish is later refined.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md states 'Existing Test Baseline: 921 tests must pass at all times' but the test count has grown to 930 (929 before this commit + 3 new = 932 after, though handoff reports 930). The baseline number is stale and should be updated to reflect the current test count after the milestone completes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md line 'Existing Test Baseline: 921 tests' vs handoff reporting '930 tests passed across 31 test files'

summary: Pass. All four requirements met: icons enlarged from 20x24 to 30x36 (1.5x scale fitting the 36px title bar), img-icon.svg y-origin fixed, single-channel coverage correctly converted to 3-channel RGB for draw_coverage(), document names changed to 'Text'/'Image'. Three new tests added, existing test updated. Visual verification confirmed clean rendering. No blocking issues found.
